idea-plugin.name: KeepGoing
idea-plugin.description:
Return to unfinished projects without the mental friction.

KeepGoing captures development session checkpoints and shows a re-entry briefing when you return to a project after a period of inactivity, helping you pick up exactly where you left off.

Features

  • Re-entry briefing: See what you were working on, when you last worked, and your next step
  • Sidebar panel: Full briefing, session history, and decisions in a tool window
  • Status bar: Quick indicator showing last activity time
  • Open touched files: Restore your workspace with one click
  • Lightweight: Read-only companion that works alongside MCP and CLI
  • Local-first: All data stays on your machine

How it works

Install the KeepGoing MCP server or CLI to capture session checkpoints. This plugin reads the checkpoint data and surfaces briefings, session history, and decisions in the IDE.
